Game.Name: Super Gomoku Narabe - Renju (Japan)
Game.plot: Overview:Super Gomoku Narabe Renju ("Super Five Piece Line-Up Renju") is a board game adaptation for the Super Famicom developed and published by Naxat Soft. The game is played with a Go board and pieces, but the goal is to simply line up five pieces horizontally, vertically or diagonally. The game has a few modes, including a tournament mode in which the player takes on CPU opponents of increasing difficulty.The last Gomoku Narabe Renju adaptation for a Nintendo console was also one of the earliest games released for the original Famicom. It was created by Nintendo themselves and is otherwise unrelated to Super Gomoku Narabe Renju.
